General.Name: Bamboos Health Care Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Bamboos Health Care Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides healthcare staffing solutions in Hong Kong. The company offers outreach case assessment; clinic; private nursing; home care and out-patient escorting; professional home care and rehabilitation assessment; palliative/hospice care at home; home safety assessment and modification; professional rehabilitation equipment rental; and physiotherapy and occupational therapy services. It also provides marketing and consulting services; and technology promotion and application services. In addition, the company engages in the sale of health-related merchandise; planning and organizing special events; retail business; and operation of vaccination centers. It serves individuals and institutional clients, including hospitals, social service organizations, and clinics. Bamboos Health Care Holdings Limited was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Mong Kok, Hong Kong. Bamboos Health Care Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Gold Empress Limited.
General.Address: Good Hope Building, Mong Kok, Hong Kong
